# Truth Contract (Generated)

Contract: `TRUTH-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `truth`
Version: `2026-03-21`

Rules: 8

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-TRUTH-001 | must | realm-truth-scope | Realm canonical truth is limited to world truth and agent truth; runtime story output is not truth by default. |
| R-TRUTH-002 | must | world-rule-canonical | World truth is anchored by WorldRule entries and WorldRelease snapshots; Worldview is computed projection only. |
| R-TRUTH-003 | must | agent-rule-canonical | Agent truth is anchored by AgentRule entries bound to world scope; agent truth defines identity and durable behavioral boundaries only. |
| R-TRUTH-004 | must | creator-only-truth-write | Truth writes are reserved for creator/control-plane authority and cannot be produced by runtime story execution. |
| R-TRUTH-005 | must | truth-write-audited | Truth changes are explicit, versioned, transactional, and auditable; projection updates cannot masquerade as truth writes. |
| R-TRUTH-006 | must | truth-app-independent | Realm truth remains app-independent and cannot be owned by a single app, renderer, or model route. |
| R-TRUTH-007 | must | oasis-is-system-main-world | OASIS is the unique system main world in Realm truth, cannot be creator-owned, and cannot be replaced by creator convention. |
| R-TRUTH-008 | must | oasis-read-surface-formal | GET /api/world/oasis is a formal Realm truth read surface for the system main world and not a legacy browse shortcut. |

Entities: 4

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| World | World | id, type, status |  |
| WorldRule | WorldRule | id, worldId, ruleKey, title, statement, domain, hardness, scope, status, version | structured, dependsOn, conflictsWith |
| AgentRule | AgentRule | id, agentId, ruleKey, title, statement, layer, hardness, scope, status, version | structured, dependsOn, conflictsWith |
| WorldRelease | WorldRelease | id, worldId, versionTag, worldRuleChecksum, agentRuleChecksum | metadata |

Required operations: 14
- GET /api/world/oasis
- GET /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/rules
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/rules
- PATCH /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/rules/{ruleId}
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/rules/{ruleId}/deprecate
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/rules/{ruleId}/archive
- GET /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/agents/{agentId}/rules
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/agents/{agentId}/rules
- PATCH /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/agents/{agentId}/rules/{ruleId}
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/agents/{agentId}/rules/{ruleId}/deprecate
- POST /api/world/by-id/{worldId}/agents/{agentId}/rules/{ruleId}/archive
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/worldview
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/lorebooks

Secondary operations: 2
- GET /api/world
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/media-bindings
